mapper.sql: t.id, t.user_id, t.teacher_no, t.teacher_name, t.gender, t.dept_id, d.dept_name, t.title_name, t.phone, t.email, t.status, t.remark, t.created_by, t.updated_by
mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.user_id, t.teacher_no, t.teacher_name, t.gender, t.dept_id, d.dept_name, t.title_name, t.phone, t.email, t.status, u.username AS account_username, u.status AS account_status FROM biz_teacher t LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = t.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = t.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE
ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT t.id, t.user_id, t.teacher_no, t.teacher_name, t.gender, t.dept_id, d.dept_name, t.title_name, t.phone, t.email, t.status, u.username AS account_username, u.status AS account_status FROM biz_teacher t LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = t.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = t.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE
ORDER BY t.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_teacher t WHERE

SELECT , u.username AS account_username, u.status AS account_status FROM biz_teacher t LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = t.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = t.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM biz_teacher t LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = t.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM biz_teacher t LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = t.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE t.teacher_no = #{teacherNo} AND t.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM biz_teacher t LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = t.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_teacher ( user_id, teacher_no, teacher_name, gender, dept_id, title_name, phone, email, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{teacherNo}, #{teacherName}, #{gender}, #{deptId}, #{titleName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_teacher SET user_id = #{userId}, teacher_no = #{teacherNo}, teacher_name = #{teacherName}, gender = #{gender}, dept_id = #{deptId}, title_name = #{titleName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_teacher SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_teacher SET user_id = NULL, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
